'''Kossex''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
An uncommon [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], Kossex was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Having been raised at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] since early infancy, Master Kossex was not a worshiper of her peoples' deity, the [[Quay]].<ref name="NEGAS" />

When the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] went to war, Master Kossex dutifully took up ranks in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], taking the title of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]]. Early in the fighting known as the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] Master Kossex was dispatched to [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], the hub of the Republic's [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] operations to protect it from an attack by the Confederacy. Under the overall command of Masters [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]] and [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]], Kossex served as part of [[Red Squadron (Galactic Republic)/Legends|Red Squadron]], a starfighter wing led by Master [[Tsui Choi/Legends|Tsui Choi]]. Piloting a [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 interceptor]] over [[Tipoca City/Legends|Tipoca City]], Kossex went head-to-head with several [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]] during the [[First Battle of Kamino|fighting]]. Aiding Jedi [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] evade an enemy fighter, Kossex failed to notice another starfighter on her tail. Before she could react the droid fired and destroyed her interceptor and killed Master Kossex instantly.<ref name="DOK" /> Because of her adherence to the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]], her people did not mourn her loss, viewing her instead as a heretic.<ref name="NEGAS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kossex is mistakenly identified as male in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', which contradicts her gender as established in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''.
